queueScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationQueue contract collapses exact duplicate mutations by dedupeKey and keeps the latest payload intent
mutationQueue contract coalesces compatible pending mutations into a single queued intent

queueScenariosCovered.scenario: terminal mutation absorbs obsolete pending ops
queueScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationQueue contract lets a terminal mutation absorb obsolete pending draft intent without losing the last valid action

queueScenariosCovered.scenario: inflight mutation restored/reset correctly after recovery path
queueScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationQueue contract restores stuck inflight mutations back to queued and emits recovery telemetry

queueScenariosCovered.scenario: retry scheduling honors nextRetryAt while network_back can recover network-unreachable entries immediately
queueScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationQueue contract respects retry scheduling but lets network_back recover network-unreachable retries immediately

queueScenariosCovered.scenario: queue compaction/pruning keeps active truth and only trims terminal history
queueScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationQueue contract prunes terminal history to the newest 20 entries without corrupting active queue truth

workerScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationWorker contract turns retryable sync failures into retry_scheduled queue state

workerScenariosCovered.scenario: retry exhaustion becomes failed_non_retryable terminal state
workerScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationWorker contract turns exhausted retries into failed_non_retryable terminal state
mutationWorker contract turns stale/conflict failures into conflicted queue state

workerScenariosCovered.scenario: stuck processing mutation is recovered before worker execution continues
workerScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationWorker contract restores stuck processing mutations before retrying them through the worker

workerScenariosCovered.scenario: completed mutation exits active processing and is not reprocessed on next flush
workerScenariosCovered.proofTest: mutationWorker contract removes completed mutations from active processing and does not reprocess them on the next flush

outOfScope: UI and foreman draft business logic rewrites
